zh.lifeSummary: 當William Thomas Perrot於1433年出生在威爾士布洛可爾哈洛爾德斯頓 韋斯特時，他的父親Thomas Perrot Esq.28歲，母親Jane Guise14歲。他和Jane Wogan至少有4個兒子和10個女兒。他去世於1503年6月7日在威爾士梅利奧爾享年70歲，埋葬在威爾士布洛可爾哈維福德維斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Perrot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Gilles, Veronique.
French: from a pet form of the Old French personal name Perre, a variant of Pierre , French form of Peter . Compare Perrotte .
Breton: from a French-influenced pet form (see 1 above) of the personal name Per, Breton form of Peter . Compare Perro .

variants.name: Pierre
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Jacques, Antoine, Yves, Michel, Jean Claude, Mireille, Jean Robert, Francois, Monique, Raoul, Serge.
French, Walloon, West Indian (mainly Haiti), and Mauritian:

from the personal name Pierre, French form of Peter (see also below). This is one of the most frequent surnames in Haiti (along with Jean and Joseph ) and in Saint Martin. It is also established elsewhere in the West Indies (e.g. in Trinidad and Tobago, Saint Lucia, Grenada, and Bahamas).

variants.name: Perrotte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Damien, Henri.
Altered form of French Perrot or Perrault , reflecting the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.
French: from the feminine form of   Perrot  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When William Thomas Perrot was born in 1433, in Haroldston West, Pembrokeshire, Wales, his father, Thomas Perrot Esq., was 28 and his mother, Jane Guise, was 14. He had at least 4 sons and 10 daughters with Jane Wogan. He died on 7 June 1503, in Merionethshire, Wales, at the age of 70, and was buried in Haverfordwest, Pembrokeshire, Wales.

ja.lifeSummary: William Thomas Perrotが1433年にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアハロルドストン ウエストで生まれた時，父Thomas Perrot Esq.は28歳，母Jane Guiseは14歳であった。彼はJane Woganとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と10人の娘をもうけた。彼は1503年6月7日にウェールズメリオンエスシュアイアで70歳で死去し，ウェールズペンブロケシュアイアヘイバーフォードウエストにて埋葬された。

ko.Haroldston, Pemb., Wales: 영국 웨일스 p브로케실르 하로드스턴 스트 이셀스
ko.lifeSummary: William Thomas Perrot(이)가 1433년 웨일스 p브로케실르 하로드스턴 웨스트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Perrot Esq.(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Guise(은)는 14세였다. 그는 Jane Wogan(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 열 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1503년 6월 7일 웨일스 머이오네스실르에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 p브로케실르 하버퍼드w스트에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Thomas Perrot родился в 1433 г. в местности харолдстон вест, пемброкешир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Thomas Perrot Esq. было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Guise, 14.
